items.summary: Update `frontend/src/components/GasRefillPanel.tsx` to display the 'Cooking Gas Changed On' section with the following layout: a 'Previously on:' sub-label listing '24th Dec 2025' and '26th Jan 2026', and a 'Latest on:' sub-label showing '2nd Mar 2026'. Additionally, update the 'Refill Delivered On Below Dates:' section to use the same 'Previously on:' / 'Latest on:' layout: 'Previously on:' listing '8th Dec 2025' and '21st Jan 2026', and 'Latest on:' showing '3rd Feb 2026'. Keep all existing card styling consistent with the rest of the panel.
